nodes.name: Webhook: Schedule Visit
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/schedule-visit. Body: { visit_id, scheduled_date (YYYY-MM-DD), scheduled_time (HH:MM), duration_minutes? (default 90), assigned_rep_email, attendee_email? }. Called by the dashboard's Visits page when a manager confirms a slot, OR auto-fired by the Nurture Agent when a buyer's WhatsApp reply confirms a slot.

nodes.name: Google Calendar: Create Event
nodes.notes: Creates the event on the rep's primary calendar. sendUpdates=all triggers Google to email .ics invites to all attendees. The rep + buyer (if email captured) get the invite + reminder pings.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ visit_id: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.visit_id, calendar_event_id: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_event_id, calendar_event_url: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_event_url, summary: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.summary, startISO: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.startISO, attendees: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.attendees, ok: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.ok, calendar_error: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_error }) }}
={{ 'Visit ' + $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.visit_id + ' at ' + $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.startISO }}

={{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.ok ? ('Calendar event ' + $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_event_id + ' created. Attendees: ' + $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.attendees.length) : ('Calendar sync FAILED: ' + ($('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_error || 'unknown')) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.ok, visit_id: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.visit_id, calendar_event_id: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_event_id, calendar_event_url: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_event_url, summary: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.summary, startISO: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.startISO, error: $('Code: Parse Calendar Response').first().json.calendar_error } }}
